fields.Identifying_Data_Chief_Complaint: 32-year-old Asian American male with schizophrenia for routine visit.
fields.Subjective: Patient arrived appearing well-groomed and positive. Reports excellent adherence to risperidone 6 mg nightly using bedtime routine, never misses doses. States feeling very well. No hallucinations for six months. No paranoid ideation. Sleep excellent at 8 hours nightly. Appetite good, weight stable at 164 lbs. Working full-time as pharmacy technician, thriving in healthcare career. Mood 'excellent' rated 8/10. Lives independently in apartment. Recently started taking evening classes toward pharmacy degree. Enjoys martial arts training three times weekly. Engaged in Asian American young professionals group. One year sober from all substances. Building career and financial stability. No safety concerns, denies SI/HI. (Evaluated by Dr. David Park, MD, Psychiatrist)

Mental_Status_Examination.Appearance: Professionally dressed, excellent grooming, positive demeanor

fields.Psychosocial_Context: Living independently; employed full-time as pharmacy tech; pursuing degree; one year sober; active in martial arts and community.
Assessment_and_Plan: Outstanding medication adherence and sustained remission.
fields.Author: Note written by Dr. David Park, MD, Psychiatrist — Asian Professional Mental Health, 4521 Success Plaza, Los Angeles, CA 90012, Phone: (555) 447-8821, Fax: (555) 447-8822
